headline: 1 Surging  Stock to Research Further and 2 We Ignore
summary: Great things are happening to the stocks in this article. They’re all outperforming the market over the last month because of positive catalysts such as a new product line, constructive news flow, or even a loyal Reddit fanbase.

headline: Vertiv to Report Q1 Earnings: Buy, Sell or Hold the VRT Stock?
summary: Vertiv is set to report Q1'26 results on April 22, with AI-driven order growth, a deep cooling portfolio, and an expanding partner base that includes NVIDIA.
